title: SignalResult
description: The output of one signal lane evaluation for one ticker in one cycle.

x-changelog.0.2.0: T159 Phase 2 finalization: add suppression_reason_code enum; add weight field; add descriptions

cycle_id.description: Opaque identifier for the evaluation cycle.

as_of.description: Point-in-time boundary at which this signal was evaluated (ISO 8601).

score.description: Normalized signal score. Interpretation is lane-specific; typically a z-score.

direction.description: Directional signal implied by the score.

actionability.description: Gate result. ACTIONABLE contributes to conviction; CONTEXT_ONLY is advisory; SUPPRESSED is blocked.

source_tier.description: Data quality tier of the primary source for this signal.

verification_level.description: Whether this signal comes from a confirmed data source or is inferred from bars/prints.

freshness.description: Freshness of the underlying data at as_of.

confidence.description: Model confidence in this signal in [0, 1].

provenance.description: Full provenance record for the primary source observation.

reason_codes.description: Machine-readable codes explaining why this actionability label was assigned.

suppression_reason.description: Human-readable description of why this signal was suppressed, or null.

suppression_reason_code.description: Standardized machine-readable suppression code. Absent when actionability != SUPPRESSED.

weight.description: Lane weight applied in a combination signal evaluation. Absent for single-lane evaluations.

summary.description: Optional human-readable summary of this signal for display in the review UI.
